title: Show HN: Nub – A Bun-like all-in-one toolkit for Node.js
summary: Nub 是一个为 Node.js 设计的类 Bun 的全能工具包，通过预加载钩子添加转译器和模块解析钩子。
translated_summary: Nub is an all-in-one toolkit for Node.js, similar to Bun, that adds a transpiler and module resolution hooks via a preload hook, running code with stock Node.js.
